options: Assignment of Lease Rents and Profits - Deed Book
Mechanics Lien - Sep. Aff. Of Server
Notice of Pledge of Real Estate

instructions.html: All names must be indexed in accordance with the Horry County Indexing Standards

Please enter Grantor/Grantee names in all CAPS (i.e. JOHN DOE) or in all lower case letters (i.e. john doe). Please do not enter the individual and company names in Title Case (i.e. John Doe). Doing this causes auto rejections to occur from the county's software system.
All Deeds and Easements must be accompanied by an Affidavit submitted as the last page of the Deed.

In accordance with South Carolina Transmittal Sheet requirements (page 7,  113-330 A (6) and page 9 & 10, 113-350 (C)), a cover sheet will be auto-generated after you signify that this document is recordable and complete indexing requirements. This cover sheet will add at least one additional page to your document and may be subject to additional fees.
If document indexing information requires special characters such as an & please walk the document into the county
Multiple book and/or page numbers must be separated with a comma.  For example, book numbers 5467 and 1478 would be indexed as "5467, 1478"
Only 1 cross reference is allowed per satisfaction. If multiple documents need to be satisfied, they must be submitted as separate documents.
If the document is tax exempt please index the consideration field amount as "$0.00".
